name: evergreen
description: Pre-deployment AI evaluation for the public sector

scripts.build: tsc && cp src/web/*.html dist/web/ && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp -r node_modules/@uswds/uswds/dist/css node_modules/@uswds/uswds/dist/js node_modules/@uswds/uswds/dist/img node_modules/@uswds/uswds/dist/fonts dist/assets/
